Item Name: Lawrys Mix Seasoning Spaghetti Rich Thick, 1.42 oz (Pack of 6)
Bullet Point 1: Made with natural herbs and spices like basil and thyme
Bullet Point 2: Features a winning combination of onion, garlic and Romano cheese
Bullet Point 3: Creates thick, flavorful spaghetti sauce in no time
Bullet Point 4: Great with tomato paste or sauce
Bullet Point 5: Add in meat for a heartier dish or red wine for a twist
Product Description: Unforgettable spaghetti dinners just got easier thanks to Lawry's Extra Rich & Thick Spaghetti Sauce Seasoning Mix. Featuring a blend of onion, garlic and real Romano cheese, as well as natural herbs like oregano, basil, thyme and parsley, this mix is the answer for creating thick, homemade spaghetti sauce with authentic Italian flavor. Simply combine mix with water, oil, and tomato paste or sauce and simmer to perfection. Add ground beef, sausage or meatballs for a heartier meal.
Value: 6.0
Unit: Count
product_name: Extra Rich & Thick Spaghetti Sauce Seasoning Mix
overall_summary: Mid-tier branded seasoning mix positioned as a convenient, time-saving solution for homemade-style spaghetti sauce. The 'Extra Rich & Thick' claim and inclusion of natural herbs suggest a value-added but non-premium product, appealing to home cooks prioritizing authentic Italian flavor without premium pricing. Bundle packaging (6-count) enhances perceived value for bulk buyers, while the absence of organic, gluten-free, or specialty certifications confirms standard mass-market positioning.

Featuring brands such as Legal Sea Foods, Michel Design Works, Montebello, Napa Valley Naturals, Stonewall Home, Stonewall Kitchen, Urban Accents, Vermont Coffee Company, Vermont Village, and Village Candle Bullet Point 6: About Us: It all started in 1991 at a local farmers' market with a few dozen items that we'd finished hand-labeling only hours before. Expertly made with premium ingredients, our products are the result of decades spent dreaming up, testing and producing only the very best in specialty foods and fine home living. Product Description: Tillen Farms Pearl Cherries, 10 oz

Grown in the Northwest, these Amarena-style cherries are tiny in size but mighty in flavor. Stemless and pitless, they are soaked in a rich syrup and bring a sweet finish to drinks like Manhattans and Old Fashioneds. Try them atop sundaes for a fine finish to your after-dinner treat.

About Tillen Farms

Tillen Farms sets the bar high for how cocktails should taste. From crisp pickled veggies to American-grown cherries to sassy syrups, these garnishes and add-ins celebrate produce that’s picked at the peak of ripeness for year-round enjoyment. Perfect for mixing and mingling with your favorite drinks and dishes, these exceptionally delicious products are the start to all sorts of spirited fun!

Value: 10.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium gourmet product positioned for cocktail and dessert use, leveraging artisanal quality and specialty ingredients. The 10 oz glass jar packaging enhances perceived value, while 'Non GMO' certification and Stonewall Kitchen branding signal a mid-to-high-tier price point. Targets consumers seeking unique, flavorful garnishes for mixology or fine dining applications.
